metadata.description: HDIM Hospital Customer Profiles - Comprehensive quality measurement platform targeting
metadata.dataSource: Healthcare industry benchmarks and CMS publicly reported data patterns

largeAcademicMedicalCenter.name: Large Academic Medical Center
largeAcademicMedicalCenter.description: Teaching hospitals affiliated with medical schools, providing tertiary and quaternary care with extensive research programs

keyMeasures.measureName: Osteoporosis Management in Women Who Had a Fracture

gaps.issue: Colorectal cancer screening in 50-75 age group
Avoidable ED visits by chronic disease patients

approach: Enhanced discharge planning with risk stratification
hdimUtilization: Care gap identification for discharged patients

primaryQualityInitiatives.initiative: Improve CMS Star Rating to 4 Stars
approach: Improve timely and effective care measures

careGapClosurePriorities.strategy: Ambulatory care coordination with pharmacy integration
FIT kit mailing program with patient navigation

populationHealthNeeds.description: Manage 145,000 attributed lives across MSSP ACO
requirements: Risk stratification of entire attributed population

populationHealthNeeds.description: Achieve 4+ star rating for MA plan partnerships

actionTriggers: High-risk designation triggers care management enrollment
Top 5% risk triggers intensive care management

communityHospital.name: Community Hospital
communityHospital.description: General acute care hospitals serving local communities with essential medical services and select specialty programs

keyMeasures.measureName: Follow-Up After Hospitalization for Mental Illness

gaps.rootCause: Limited data on SNF quality outcomes

primaryQualityInitiatives.goal: Move patient experience from Below Average to Average

careGapClosurePriorities.strategy: FIT kit program with centralized reminder system
Certified diabetes educator program with group visits

requirements: Care gap closure for attributed patients

ruralCriticalAccessHospital.name: Rural Critical Access Hospital
ruralCriticalAccessHospital.description: Small rural hospitals designated as Critical Access Hospitals by CMS, providing essential services to geographically isolated communities

focusAreas: Limited volume excludes from most measures

gaps.rootCause: Program not financially viable at low volume
Mobile services sporadic, patient travel burden

qualityStaff.note: Quality functions often shared with nursing leadership

barriers: No dedicated IT staff (shared with operations)

partners: May be part of regional network

primaryQualityInitiatives.goal: Achieve top quartile performance in MBQIP measures
hdimUtilization: Care gap reports for primary care
Patient registry with simple risk tiers

careGapClosurePriorities.strategy: Home BP monitoring program with pharmacist support

populationHealthNeeds.description: Address health needs of service area population

specialtyHospital.name: Specialty Hospital
specialtyHospital.description: Hospitals focusing on specific service lines such as cardiac, orthopedic, rehabilitation, or pediatric care with concentrated expertise

annualEDVisits.note: Only applicable to some specialty types

keyMeasures.measureName: Persistence of Beta-Blocker Treatment After Heart Attack
Statin Therapy for Patients With Cardiovascular Disease
Well-Child Visits in the First 15 Months of Life
Follow-Up Care for Children Prescribed ADHD Medication

specialtySpecificPrograms.program: Children's Hospitals Solutions for Patient Safety

primaryQualityInitiatives.goal: Achieve positive reconciliation in all bundled episodes

careGapClosurePriorities.strategy: Automated post-discharge outreach with remote monitoring

populationHealthNeeds.description: Build high-value network of referring providers and post-acute partners
Demonstrate superior outcomes for employer and payer contracts

actionTriggers: High-cost risk triggers care pathway optimization

communityHospital.primaryValue: Practical quality improvement with limited resources

ruralCriticalAccessHospital.primaryValue: Accessible quality tools for resource-constrained settings

tier1.rationale: High contract value, complex needs match HDIM capabilities

tier4.rationale: Different pricing model needed, grant funding opportunities
